# Writeblock

> Block Apps Until You Journal

Writeblock is an iOS app that locks your dopamine apps (social media, games, etc.) until you write a journal entry. Just 50 characters — that's all it takes to unlock.

## Core Concept

- Your chosen apps get blocked at a set time (default 10 PM)
- Write 50+ characters to unlock them instantly
- No account, no subscription — your journal stays on your iPhone

## How It Works

1. Choose which apps to block after your set time
2. Write at least 50 characters in your journal
3. Apps unlock immediately

## Features

- **No account needed**: Install and start immediately
- **Privacy-first**: No servers of our own, no ads. Your journal stays on your device; only anonymous, opt-out usage analytics ever leave it
- **App Lock & iCloud sync (free)**: Protect the app with Face ID or a PIN and back up across devices — no upgrade required
- **Photos & voice**: Attach photos or record voice memos alongside your journal
- **Streak tracking**: Track your daily journaling streak
- **Export**: Markdown format with all attachments (photos, voice memos)
- **Designed to graduate**: Build the habit, then move to any journaling app

## Pricing

- **Free forever**: Unlimited journaling (photos & voice), streaks, calendar, search, App Lock (Face ID/PIN), iCloud sync, all themes, and export
- **App Blocking ($9.99 one-time)**: Block any apps you choose and unlock them by journaling. Free for the first week, then a single non-consumable purchase — no subscription

## Links

- Website: https://writeblock.app
- Privacy Policy: https://writeblock.app/privacy.html
- Terms of Use: https://writeblock.app/terms.html

## Technical Details

- Platform: iOS (16+)
- Built with: Swift, SwiftUI
- Data storage: On-device (Core Data), optional iCloud sync (free, on by default)
- No backend servers of our own, no Firebase, no ads — one analytics SDK (PostHog: anonymous, EU-hosted, opt-out) for funnel metrics; diary content and PII are never sent
- Screen Time API for app blocking
